title: Requilisant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Requilisant''' was a chemical compound that reduced the dexterity penalty associated with operating in low or zero [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]. It cost 200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per dose and the effects lasted for 6 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]. Requilisant could be applied by the [[Cyduct E-23 Booster]] interdermal injection system.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'' {{1stm}}
